name: mqlc
description: ``` mqlc/ ├── index.html              Main HTML file ├── css/ │   ├── main.css            Variables, reset, typography, utilities │   ├── navbar.css          Sticky navbar + language switcher │   ├── hero.css            Hero section with parallax │   ├── sections.css        (coming — shared section styles) │   ├── timeline.css        (coming — construction timeline) │   ├── programs.css        (coming — program cards) │   ├── donate.css          (coming — donation section) │   └── footer.css          (coming — footer) ├── js/ │   ├── main.js             Scroll animations, parallax, navbar, counters │   └── donate.js           (coming — donation toggle logic) ├── images/ │   └── (add your images here — see naming guide below) └── README.md ```
